---
title: "Title"
author: "Author 1 (First Name Last Name)"
format: 
  pdf:
    documentclass: article   
    fontsize: 11pt          
    geometry: "top=2.5cm,bottom=2.5cm,left=2.5cm,right=3.5cm"
    mainfont: "Arial"        # font family
    linestretch: 1.5         # line spacing
    latex-engine: xelatex
---

# Test
This is a test.

# LaTeX formula

$$ Y_{it} = \mu_t + \alpha \left(Y_{i,t-1} - \mu_{t-1}\right) + \gamma \, PA^{W}_{i,t-1} + \varepsilon_{it}, \qquad
E(\varepsilon_{it} \mid Y_{i,t-1}) = 0. $$
